bird.name: 红腹拟鹩哥
bird.summary: 红腹拟鹩哥（学名：Hypopyrrhus pyrohypogaster），是雀形目拟鹂科的一种鸟类，属于单型的红腹拟鹩哥属（学名：Hypopyrrhus）。 红腹拟鹩哥体重约101克，翼长约13.98厘米，喙宽度约8.4毫米，喙厚度约11.7毫米，嘴峰长约31.7毫米，跗蹠长约…

relations.subject: 红腹拟鹩哥
relations.evidence: Da Fonseca |name-list-style=amp |publisher=Cambridge University Press |isbn=978-0-521-82502-3 |chapter-url=https://books.google.com/books?id=3W_TN0790vEC&pg=PA293}} One of the grackles, it is endemic to Colombia where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 红腹拟鹩哥
relations.evidence: The species is threatened by habitat destruction and the International Union for Conservation of Nature considers it to be a "vulnerable species"
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
